pr.title: Non-record: Selective Freeze on Random Linear Maps — Why Freezing Gate+Up Beats Full Freeze + LoRA

output.summary: Selective freezing of gate+up MLP projections on random linear maps keeps attention learning while shrinking artifacts, surpassing full freeze+LoRA.
techniques: Freeze only gate+up MLP projections while learning attention and down outputs to retain relational learning
Treat frozen random projections as structural regularizer inspired by Johnson-Lindenstrauss to save artifact bytes
